description_long: This is a pair of over-ear wireless headphones, featuring a robust, matte black plastic headband that arches smoothly over the top. The ear cups are large and circular, padded with thick, soft cushions for comfort during extended use. The exterior of the ear cups is solid and slightly textured, with a subtle logo visible on the side, suggesting a branded product. The headphones have a seamless, modern design with no visible wires, indicating Bluetooth connectivity. The hinges connecting the ear cups to the headband are reinforced, likely allowing for some adjustability to fit different head sizes. The overall build appears sturdy and designed for both comfort and durability, suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, public transport, or city streets.
description: A pair of matte black, over-ear wireless headphones with thick cushioned ear pads and a sturdy, arched headband. The design is modern, seamless, and comfortable, with a subtle logo on the ear cup.
description_view_0: The left side of the headphones is visible, showing the thick ear cushion and the logo on the ear cup.
description_view_1: The headphones are viewed from the front-left, highlighting the curvature of the headband and the depth of the ear cushions.
description_view_2: The right side of the headphones is visible, with the logo on the ear cup and the full shape of the right ear pad.
description_view_3: The headphones are viewed from the front-right, showing both ear cups and the arch of the headband.
